_note: Baseline rebased post EPIC-018 (PR#333). EPIC-018 added ~900 lines to backend (new routers ai_feedback/audit/user_settings, schemas, confidence_tier service, migration 0015). Marginal uncovered lines are defensive 4xx error branches in new routers; future PRs ratchet coverage forward from this floor. Prior baseline (98.39% backend on 6,453 lines) measured a smaller pre-EPIC-018 surface. Scripts floor ratcheted from 93.83% to 94.48% after adding tests for lint_doc_consistency, build_ac_traceability, and audit_ac_epic_mismatches (PR#344). All per-component floors set 0.05% below CI-measured actuals to tolerate minor cross-environment measurement variance.
